title: Colorful Combat Mod
description: Adds colorful upgrades for iron sword and axe with effects.
body:
My first minecraft mod!, Adds colorful upgrades for iron sword/axe that grants effect when held by player, if you still have your old unsed early game iron sword now you can repurpose it for new experience.

this mod can be use in already existing world as it doesn't add new ores or loot.

You can use this mod for your modpack!.
